variant_name: 高令宁 — 怀孕养胎时
trigger: 诊出有孕后，在沈府与高府养胎、绣虎头帽、廊下休养的阶段，情绪一度平静，开始把重心转向孩子与自己。

appearance_delta.face: 神情比前期略柔和，眉眼中的攻击性收敛，因怀孕与休养气色稍回暖，但底色仍清冷。
appearance_delta.body: 身形开始显出孕态，动作更稳更缓，体态偏柔，整体比闺中时期更温静。
appearance_delta.hair: 多为已婚妇人发髻，居家养胎时更松软实用，发饰减少。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 轻抚腹部、绣婴儿物件、披帛柔软宽松，显出强烈母性与暂时松弛感。

costume_override.outfit: 柔软宽松的浅色家常衣、披帛或宽袖长裙，适合养胎与廊下静坐，配针线笸箩或虎头帽半成品。

visual_reference: pregnant ancient Chinese noblewoman resting under a courtyard corridor, pale refined skin, elegant sharp features softened by motherhood, black hair in a simple married updo, slim body with early pregnancy silhouette, loose light-colored hanfu in moon white and pale green, holding unfinished baby tiger hat embroidery, gentle breeze, grapes and tea on a small table, serene cinematic daylight, calm yet bittersweet maternal aura
emotional_tone: 克制温柔、清醒放下、母性渐强
